zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Drury於1402年出生在英國素福爾可盧加姆時，她的父親Sir Roger Drury40歲，母親Margery de Naunton45歲。她於1425年10月7日與Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧申布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1445年在英國素福爾可可拉特費爾德享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Drury于1402年出生在英国素福爾可盧加姆时，她的父亲Sir Roger Drury40岁，母亲Margery de Naunton45岁。她于1425年10月7日与Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett在英国英格兰素福爾可盧申布盧可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1445年在英国素福爾可可拉特費爾德享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Drury was born in 1402, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Roger Drury, was 40 and her mother, Margery de Naunton, was 45. She married Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett on 7 October 1425, in Rushbrooke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1445, in Cratfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Drury est née en 1402, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Drury, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margery de Naunton, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett le 7 octobre 1425, à Rushbrooke, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1445, à Cratfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Drury 1402 in Rougham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Drury 40 und ihre Mutter Margery de Naunton 45. Sie hat am 7. Oktober 1425 in Rushbrooke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1445 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Cratfield, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Drury è nata il nel 1402 nel Rougham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Roger Drury, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margery de Naunton, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett il 7 ottobre 1425, nel Rushbrooke, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1445, nel Cratfield, Suffolk, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Druryが1402年にイギリススフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Druryは40歳，母Margery de Nauntonは45歳であった。1425年10月7日にイギリスイギリススフォルクルシュブルークでLord John FitzWilliam Barrettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1445年にイギリススフォルククラトフィールドで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Drury(이)가 1402년 영국 수폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Drury(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Naunton(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1425년 10월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 러스h브룩에서 Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 수폴크 크라트필드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Drury nasceu em 1402, em Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Drury, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Naunton, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett em 7 de outubro de 1425, em Rushbrooke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1445, em Cratfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Drury родилась в 1402 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Drury было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Naunton, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett 7 октября 1425 г. в местности рушбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1445 г. в местности кратфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Drury nació en 1402, en Rougham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Drury, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margery de Naunton, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Lord John FitzWilliam Barrett el 7 de octubre de 1425, en Rushbrooke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1445, en Cratfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
